summary: Add opencode-safe-io workspace dep to opencode-learning-engine so session-key-contract integration test resolves its import. Lower integrity-baseline minimumCount from 35 to 8 and sync required skills list to the 8 skills actually installed (budget-aware-router, code-doctor, evaluation-harness-builder, incident-commander, innovation-migration-planner, research-builder, skill-orchestrator-runtime, token-reporter).
